mapper.select: SELECT * FROM live_class_participant WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND uid = #{uid} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM live_class_participant WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO live_class_participant ( session_id, uid, role, identity_type, join_count, first_join_at, last_join_at, last_leave_at, online_status, camera_enabled, mic_enabled, device_info_json, network_score, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{uid}, #{role}, #{identityType}, #{joinCount}, #{firstJoinAt}, #{lastJoinAt}, #{lastLeaveAt}, #{onlineStatus}, #{cameraEnabled}, #{micEnabled}, #{deviceInfoJson}, #{networkScore}, NOW(3), NOW(3) )
mapper.update: UPDATE live_class_participant SET join_count = #{joinCount}, first_join_at = #{firstJoinAt}, last_join_at = #{lastJoinAt}, online_status = #{onlineStatus}, camera_enabled = #{cameraEnabled}, mic_enabled = #{micEnabled}, device_info_json = #{deviceInfoJson}, network_score = #{networkScore}, update_time = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE live_class_participant SET last_leave_at = #{lastLeaveAt}, online_status = #{onlineStatus}, update_time = NOW(3) WHERE id = #{id}
